evals.prompt: /e2e Add Playwright coverage for a user searching products, opening a product detail page, and returning to results.
evals.expected_output: Uses existing Playwright patterns, proposes or writes resilient selectors and a focused test, runs the relevant target, and reports artifacts.
assertions: Uses Playwright-oriented structure, resilient locators, and user-visible assertions.
Runs the smallest relevant E2E command first or explains why it cannot run.
Reports diagnostic artifacts such as HTML report, screenshots, videos, traces, console, or network notes.
For flaky tests, characterizes the failure and replaces brittle waits/selectors with specific readiness signals.
Uses e2e-testing scope only for browser user flows, not unit-only or generic TDD work.

evals.prompt: This Playwright test flakes in CI because the submit button is sometimes missing. Debug and stabilize it.
evals.expected_output: Characterizes flake risk, replaces brittle waits/selectors with specific readiness checks, reruns the test, and reports remaining risk.
assertions: Uses Playwright-oriented structure, resilient locators, and user-visible assertions.

evals.prompt: Set up Playwright config and CI artifacts for a new app.
evals.expected_output: Creates a config with retries, reporters, screenshots/videos/traces, webServer settings when appropriate, and CI artifact upload guidance.

evals.prompt: Add CI-safe Playwright defaults for a new app and make sure failures leave useful artifacts.
